steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content: That is $\tfrac{5376}{42}\%=128\%$ of $k$. The answer is 128.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $128$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $128$.
